title: U.S.-Iran Agreement Leaves Lebanon’s Fate Murky
summary_full: Iran claimed the deal would extend to fighting in Lebanon but no details of the agreement were made public and Israel said its forces would remain there.
summary_public: Iran claimed the deal would extend to fighting in Lebanon but no details of the agreement were made public and Israel said its forces would remain there.

IL.label: neutral
